message:
fix(vfs): use checked_sub for Duration arithmetic in busy_timeout backoff

The unchecked `timeout - elapsed` subtraction tripped
clippy::unchecked_time_subtraction (pedantic, denied at workspace level).
Replace with `timeout.checked_sub(elapsed)` via let-else, which also
makes the early-return on expiry slightly more idiomatic.

Also includes a cross-process busy_timeout integration test contributed
by a concurrent agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
